# @elata-biosciences/create-elata-demo — context for tools and agents

## Role
CLI **`create-elata-demo`** that scaffolds starter apps from embedded templates. Packaged **`elataSdkVersions`** in `package.json` pin compatible **`eeg-web` / `eeg-web-ble` / `rppg-web`** versions for generated `package.json` files.

## Templates (and aliases)
| Template ID   | Aliases                          | Contents (short)                          |
|---------------|----------------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| `rppg-demo`   | `rppg`                           | React + Vite rPPG / camera                |
| `eeg-demo`    | `eeg`                            | React + Vite EEG + Web Bluetooth          |
| `eeg-ble`     | `ble`, `eeg-web-ble-demo`        | BLE-first EEG + native demo references    |

Legacy **`--template`** names still accepted: `rppg-web-demo` → `rppg-demo`, `eeg-web-demo` → `eeg-demo`.

Interactive runs ask for app type then project name. **Non-interactive runs without `--template` default to `rppg-demo`.**

## Requirements
- **Node.js >= 18**

## Commands
- `npm create @elata-biosciences/elata-demo <dir> [-- --template <name>]`
- `pnpm dlx @elata-biosciences/create-elata-demo <dir>`
- `npx @elata-biosciences/create-elata-demo <dir>`
- List templates: `pnpm dlx @elata-biosciences/create-elata-demo -- --list-templates` (note **`--` before flags** when the runner requires it)

## Workspace caveat
Scaffolding **inside** a parent **pnpm workspace** may attach to the parent and skip a local `node_modules`. Use **`pnpm --dir <app> --ignore-workspace install`** or **`npm install`** inside the new app.

## vs internal repo tools
**`create-elata-demo`** is the canonical path for new consumer apps. **`./run.sh sync-to`** is for maintainers iterating **`eeg-web`** into an existing app — not equivalent to scaffolding.

## Source of truth
https://github.com/Elata-Biosciences/elata-bio-sdk/blob/main/docs/create-elata-demo.md
